delete_role.title: Delete Role
delete_role.prompt: Are you sure you want to delete the role {role}? This will:
delete_role.remove_from_users: Remove the role from all users who have it
delete_role.delete_grants: Delete all permission grants for this role

role_form.name: Name
role_form.name_description: Lowercase letters only. Cannot be changed after creation.
role_form.name_too_long: Name must be 32 characters or less
role_form.name_invalid: Name must use lowercase letters, numbers, and dashes; start with a letter
role_form.name_locked: Role names cannot be changed after creation.
role_form.display_name_too_long: Display name must be 64 characters or less
role_form.pingable: Allow people to ping this role
role_form.pingable_description: Pingable roles appear in @ autocomplete and notify assigned room members.

permissions.no_roles: No roles applicable at this scope.

space.title: Server Permissions
space.description: Server-level capabilities kept under the legacy category key for compatibility

room.title: Room Permissions
room.description: Server defaults for room discovery and joining, plus room creation. Add room/group denies for local restrictions

message.title: Message Permissions
message.description: Server defaults for posting, threads, reactions, echoing, and message moderation. Room/group denies create local exceptions

member.title: Member Permissions
member.description: Control who can invite and remove server members

role.title: Role Permissions
role.description: Control who can edit roles, assign roles, and manage permission presets

admin.title: Admin Permissions
admin.description: Control access to server-wide administrative views and diagnostics

dm.title: DM Permissions
dm.description: Control access to direct messaging entry points

user.title: User Permissions
user.description: Control user account and per-user permission operations. Any non-owner deny cancels grants

permission_descriptions.room_list: See rooms in the directory. A user can be allowed to see a room (e.g. to request access) without being allowed to join it.
permission_descriptions.room_manage: Edit a room's settings and permissions, and delete rooms
permission_descriptions.message_post: Post root messages in rooms and start DMs
permission_descriptions.message_echo: When posting in a thread, also surface the message in the main channel
permission_descriptions.message_manage: Edit and delete other users' messages
permission_descriptions.message_react: Add and remove reactions on messages
permission_descriptions.role_manage: Create, edit, delete, and reorder roles and their permission grants
permission_descriptions.role_assign: Assign and revoke roles for users
permission_descriptions.admin_view_users: View the users page in admin
permission_descriptions.admin_view_audit: View the audit log in admin
permission_descriptions.user_manage_accounts: Create users, edit account identity, reset passwords, attach verified emails, and clear login cooldowns
